StructurePhase.Reference: Savitskii E.M., Polyakova V.P., Krivdin B.P., Kozlov A.A., Khorlin Y.M., Diagrammy Sostoyaniya Met. Sist., Mater. Vses. Soveshch. 4th p200 (1971)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 1928671. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS: Pd,Sc. THERMALTREATMENT: annealed at 1573 K. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Article Title: Equilibrium diagrams of the platinum and palladium with barium, scandium and zirconium. Minor Warning: Minor warning from the LPF Editor exists. No R factors reported/abstracted. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
